targets.rawSql: SELECT LOCAL_STATUS FROM monitor_snapshots ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT timestamp, CPU_USAGE_PERCENT FROM monitor_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp, MEM_USAGE_PERCENT FROM monitor_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp, NET_LATENCY_MS FROM monitor_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND NET_LATENCY_MS IS NOT NULL ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp, WAN_RX_RATE_KBPS AS RX, WAN_TX_RATE_KBPS AS TX FROM monitor_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp, horizon, probability FROM predictions_log WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
